cards.text:
Da Nang4 hoursDa Nang Best History, Culture, Religion, Cuisine and Cafe by Private Guide-Explore the whole history of Cham Pa Kingdom, dating from 2nd-17th century in the central Vietnam featuring with magnificent sculptures at the Cham museum with each statues different stories to tell.
-Exploring Buddhist life through visiting oldest pagoda in Da Nang.
-Walk along Han river to hear stories about Vietnam war where is the main base of American military.
-Taste best Pho and Salted Coffee as your light meal before visiting Pink Church and Han Market to know colorful life of the city.Da Nang Best History, Culture, Religion, Cuisine and Cafe by Private GuideFROM$40/ per personFROM$40/ per personHung L.5.00 / 5(3 reviews)

Da Nang9 hrs 30 minsHue Ancient CapitalHue City is the former capital in Vietnam. Therefore, it will be interesting to visit here and discover how the past eras lived and a part of history of Vietnam.Hue Ancient CapitalFROM$200/ per groupFROM$200/ per groupThủy L.5.00 / 5(3 reviews)

Da Nang1 hr 10 minsMy Son Sanctuary – The Lost KingdomHidden deep within a peaceful valley surrounded by mountains, My Son Sanctuary is one of Vietnam's most important archaeological sites and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Once the spiritual and political center of the ancient Champa Kingdom, this remarkable complex features centuries-old temples dedicated to Hindu gods and offers a fascinating glimpse into a civilization that flourished long before modern Vietnam.

I can customize this tour according to your requests.My Son Sanctuary – The Lost KingdomFROM$29/ per personFROM$29/ per personCam P.

Da Nang5 hoursMy Son Sanctuary Cultural & Historic Private Half Day TourDiscover the World Heritage of My Son Sanctuary on a half-day tour from Da Nang or Hoi An. Explore the history, culture and religion of Champa ancient country from the 2nd century.

In this tour, you will visit the 1400 year-old Hindu temples. Admire the architecture and arts of the Champa people through their temple building and sculptures on sandstone. Watch traditional performance to enrich your cultural tour.My Son Sanctuary Cultural & Historic Private Half Day TourFROM$157/ per groupFROM$157/ per groupTony H.5.00 / 5(8 reviews)

Da Nang9 hoursBa Na Hills: iconic Golden Bridge Private TourBa Na hills is a highlight in your trip to Da Nang city with a comfortable weather and stunning view.

You will take one of the cable cars to your highlight awaited at the iconic Golden Bridge with the unique design. Visit Flower Gardens, Buddha Statue and a pagoda.

Enjoy your day at French village, Funicular train, Flying Around The World and hundreds of games in Fantasy Park.

Book me for a memorable day trip in which every moment is a snapshot of adventure, beauty and flavor.Ba Na Hills: iconic Golden Bridge Private TourFROM$187/ per groupFROM$187/ per groupTony H.5.00 / 5(8 reviews)

Da Nang6 hoursCoconut Village Basket Boat, Hoi An Ancient Town Private TourStart your trip by an exciting trip at Coconut village. Sitting into a round basket boat, enjoy the slow ride and watch boat spinning, fisher man throws fish net into the river, singing and dancing on the river.

Your second stop is Hoi An, one of the biggest seaports in South East Asia in a long time. Hoi An remains a long history with over 1,000 old houses, temples and pagodas. You will discover highlights and hidden charm of Hoi An with lanterns and feel the vibe of Hoi An.Coconut Village Basket Boat, Hoi An Ancient Town Private TourFROM$155/ per groupFROM$155/ per groupTony H.5.00 / 5(8 reviews)

Da Nang8 hoursDa Nang To My Lai Massacre Private Car 8 Hours (1-12 Pax)Da Nang to My Lai Massacre private car is a fast and safe option for visiting the My Lai historical site area. On this trip, you will be transferred door-to-door by our friendly driver in a modern and spacious private car.Da Nang To My Lai Massacre Private Car 8 Hours (1-12 Pax)FROM$132/ per groupFROM$132/ per groupPham Tours5.00 / 5(1 reviews)

Da Nang9 hoursCustomized Da Nang Charming-Hoi An Ancient Town By Sighteeings,Culture and Lantern Cruise By Night-Exploring all the landmarks of DaNang city like Marble Mountain, Dragon Bridge, Lady Buddha..with stories about Vietnam war where Da Nang is the base.
-Immersively discover the most beautiful highlights of Hoi An town by walking to Chinese Essembly Halls, Japanese Bridge, Old Houses.
-Enjoy any delicous local foods of Hoi An light Banh My, Cao Lau Noodles, White Rose at any hidden alleys that you love.
-Take romantic lantern cruise by private to overview the town by night.
-Let explore with us.Customized Da Nang Charming-Hoi An Ancient Town By Sighteeings,Culture and Lantern Cruise By NightFROM$93/ per personFROM$93/ per personHung L.5.00 / 5(3 reviews)

Da Nang5 hoursDa Nang To Monkey Mountain Attractions Private Car Tour 5hrs (1-12 pax)Da Nang to Monkey Mountain private car is a self-guided tour by car to the best attractions in the Son Tra Peninsula (also known as Monkey Mountain). Despite rough hilly roads, our effective personal vehicles and expert drivers will bring to tourists smooth and safe journeys.Da Nang To Monkey Mountain Attractions Private Car Tour 5hrs (1-12 pax)FROM$145/ per groupFROM$145/ per groupPham Tours5.00 / 5(1 reviews)

Da Nang8 hoursBa Na Hill Golden Bridge Tour by Professional Guide ( NO Cable Car Riding Ticket)Our local guide definitely take you to immersive experience exploring iconic Vietnam destinations.
You pass the impressive countryside of Vietnam by driving.
Mesmerizing cable car ride - the longest non-stop single track cable car in the world. 
- Admire the Golden Bridge suspended by colossal stone hands with lush greenery.
- Wander through French Village, Moon, Sun Castle, Old Pagoda, Ancient Church, Fantasy Park....
-Enjoy the wonderful street show and performances with great atmostphere.Ba Na Hill Golden Bridge Tour by Professional Guide ( NO Cable Car Riding Ticket)FROM$80/ per personFROM$80/ per personHung L.5.00 / 5(3 reviews)

Da Nang5 hrs 30 minsKy Anh Tunnel & Ancient Cham Tower by War History Tour-Admire of the beatiful ancient Cham Towers dating from 10th-11th century by history of Champa Kingdom in the central Vietnam.
-Zigzag under Ky Anh Tunnel, the third largest tunnel in Vietnam with 32 kms shaping around Thach Tan commune, with 1m in height and 1.m wide, challenging your ability when you walk underground of Bamboo tree, temples, kitchen...
-Visit the giant Heroic Mother statue who has 11 children sacrified during Vietnam war.
-Let explore by the unique experience with us!Ky Anh Tunnel & Ancient Cham Tower by War History TourFROM$150/ per groupFROM$150/ per groupHung L.5.00 / 5(3 reviews)
